name: uae-market-collector
title: UAE Market Collector
description: Scrapes Dubizzle, Bayut District 9, Bayut Ajman for-sale/rent, benchmark villa, and LuxuryPriceDrops. Outputs structured JSON for the UAE Market Monitor dashboard.
